overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark grassy field at night with a flashlight, approaching and passing a distant stone manor or church with a tall tower. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, transitioning from open field to an enclosed trail lined with dense bushes.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant manor house

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a distant stone manor visible on the horizon, sweeping a flashlight across the ground

entered.detail: large stone building with tall spire visible in the distance against the night sky
tall wild grass illuminated by the flashlight beam
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass toward the building

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through an open grassy field at night. A stone manor with a tall tower is visible in the distance, silhouetted against the dark sky. The flashlight illuminates the tall grass and narrow dirt path ahead as the camera moves steadily forward.

events.description: passing the manor house and entering a narrow trail flanked by dense bushes on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrow dirt path between dense bushes, moving away from the manor into more enclosed terrain

entered.detail: tall dense bushes lining the left side of the path, creating a wall of vegetation
tall dense bushes lining the right side of the path, enclosing the trail

segments.scene_description: Having passed the manor, the scene transitions to a narrow enclosed trail flanked by dense bushes on both sides. The stone building disappears behind as the path continues through the thick vegetation. The flashlight now illuminates the confined dirt trail ahead, creating a tunnel-like effect through the shrubbery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark nocturnal landscape that transforms from an open field into a claustrophobic trail. It begins with a steady forward movement across a grassy expanse, where a flashlight cuts through the dark to reveal a narrow dirt path and a distant stone manor with a tall tower silhouetted against the sky. As the camera passes the manor, the wide horizon disappears and the environment shifts into a narrow enclosed trail. The scene then tightens as dense bushes flank both sides of the path, creating a tunnel-like effect under the focused beam of the flashlight.
